pin_definitions.description: Switching output of the regulator. Internally connected to source of the HS FET and drain of the LS FET. Connect to power inductor and bootstrap capacitor.
Bootstrap capacitor connection for HS FET driver. Connect a high-quality 470-nF capacitor from this pin to the SW pin.
Output of internal bias supply. Used as supply to internal control circuits and drivers. Connect a high-quality 2.2-µF capacitor from this pin to GND.
Optional BIAS LDO supply input. TI recommends tying to VOUT when 3.3 V ≤ VOUT ≤ 18 V, or tie to an external 3.3-V or 5-V rail if available, to improve efficiency.
Switching frequency setting pin. Place a resistor from this pin to ground to set the switching frequency. If floating, the default switching frequency is 500 kHz.
Soft-start control pin. Leave this pin floating for a 5-ms internal soft-start ramp. An external capacitor can be connected from this pin to ground to extend the soft start time.
Feedback input for output voltage regulation. Connect a resistor divider to set the output voltage. Never short this pin to ground during operation.
No internal connection. Connect to ground net and copper to improve heat sinking and board-level reliability.
Open drain power-good flag output. Connect to suitable voltage supply through a current limiting resistor. High = VOUT regulation OK, Low = VOUT regulation fault.
Synchronization input and mode setting pin. Tie to ground for auto mode; tie to logic high for forced PWM; tie to external clock source for synchronization.
Enable input to regulator. Do not float. High = ON, Low = OFF. Can be tied to PVIN. Precision enable input allows adjustable input voltage UVLO.
Analog ground. Ground reference for internal circuitry. All electrical parameters are measured with respect to this pin.
Supply input to internal bias LDO and HS FET. Connect to input supply and input bypass capacitors CIN.
Power ground, connected to the source of LS FET internally. Connect to system ground, DAP/EP, AGND, ground side of CIN and COUT on PCB.
Low impedance connection to AGND. Connect to system ground on PCB. Major heat dissipation path for the device.

logical_pins.name: SW
logical_pins.description: Switching output of the regulator. Internally connected to source of the HS FET and drain of the LS FET.

logical_pins.name: CBOOT
logical_pins.description: Bootstrap capacitor connection for HS FET driver. Connect a high-quality 470-nF capacitor from this pin to the SW pin.

logical_pins.name: VCC
logical_pins.description: Output of internal bias supply. Used as supply to internal control circuits and drivers.

logical_pins.name: BIAS
logical_pins.description: Optional BIAS LDO supply input. Tie to ground when not in use.

logical_pins.name: RT
logical_pins.description: Switching frequency setting pin. Place a resistor from this pin to ground to set the switching frequency. If floating, the default switching frequency is 500 kHz.

logical_pins.name: SS/TRK
logical_pins.description: Soft-start control pin. Leave this pin floating for a 5-ms internal soft-start ramp. An external capacitor can be connected from this pin to ground to extend the soft start time.

logical_pins.name: FB
logical_pins.description: Feedback input for output voltage regulation. Connect a resistor divider to set the output voltage.

logical_pins.name: NC
logical_pins.description: No internal connection. Connect to ground net and copper to improve heat sinking and board-level reliability.

logical_pins.name: PGOOD
logical_pins.description: Open drain power-good flag output. Connect to suitable voltage supply through a current limiting resistor.

logical_pins.description: Synchronization input and mode setting pin. Do not float. Tie to ground if not used.

logical_pins.description: Enable input to regulator. Do not float. High = ON, Low = OFF.

logical_pins.description: Analog ground. Ground reference for internal circuitry.

logical_pins.description: Supply input to internal bias LDO and HS FET.

logical_pins.description: Power ground, connected to the source of LS FET internally.

logical_pins.name: DAP
logical_pins.description: Low impedance connection to AGND. Connect to system ground on PCB. Major heat dissipation path for the device.
